prose.en: Integrate audit record review, analysis, and reporting processes using {param:au-06.01_odp}.

guidance.en: Organizational processes that benefit from integrated audit record review, analysis, and reporting include incident response, continuous monitoring, contingency planning, investigation and response to suspicious activities, and Inspector General audits.

prose.en: audit record review, analysis, and reporting processes are integrated using {param:au-06.01_odp}.

objects.en: procedures addressing audit review, analysis, and reporting
procedures addressing investigation and response to suspicious activities
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with audit review, analysis, and reporting responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
Automated mechanisms integrating audit review, analysis, and reporting processes

guidelines.en: automated mechanisms used for integrating audit record review, analysis, and reporting processes are defined;
